ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "insurance_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the insurance company */,
  "成立年份" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "总部地址" TEXT /* Address of the company's headquarters */,
  "联系电话" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the insurance company */,
  "公司网站" TEXT /* Website URL of the insurance company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "collision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collision data related to the claim */,
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance company processing the claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed in dollars */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., property damage, personal injury) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "claim_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was resolved */,
  "claim_payout_amount" REAL /* Amount paid out for the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_insurance_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., claims analyst, underwriter, data scientist) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual, custom) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_details" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance company issuing the policy */,
  "policy_holder" TEXT /* Name of the policyholder */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy starts */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy ends */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Amount of the premium in dollars */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., comprehensive, liability) */,
  "coverage_amount" REAL /* Total coverage amount in dollars */,
  "deductible_amount" REAL /* Deductible amount in dollars */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired, canceled) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy can be renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_details_insurance_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claims analysis entry */,
  "collision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collision data linked to claims */,
  "total_claims" INTEGER /* Total number of claims filed for the collision data */,
  "average_claim_amount" REAL /* Average claim amount for the collision data */,
  "total_injured_drivers" INTEGER /* Total number of injured drivers in the claims */,
  "total_injured_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of injured passengers in the claims */,
  "total_injured_pedestrians" INTEGER /* Total number of injured pedestrians in the claims */,
  "total_fatalities" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities in the claims */,
  "average_injury_severity" REAL /* Average severity of injuries in the claims */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)
